message:
feat(tui): Add slowdown percentage to RibosomeTrafficView slow sites

Enhance slow site reporting with median-relative slowdown calculation:

slowSites computation changes:
- Calculate median codon rate from all rates
- For each of top 3 slowest sites, compute slowdown percentage
- slowdown = (median - rate) / median
- Represents how much slower than typical this codon is

Display format change:
- Before: "Codon 42: rate 1.5"
- After: "Codon 42: rate 1.5 (75% slower vs median)"
- Shows "at/near median" if slowdown <= 0

Pedagogical value:
- Raw rate numbers are hard to interpret in isolation
- Percentage slowdown gives immediate intuition
- "75% slower" immediately conveys bottleneck severity
- Helps users understand why traffic jams form at specific codons

Edge case handling:
- If median is 0 (shouldn't happen), slowdown shows as 0
- Gracefully handles empty codonRates array

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
